subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — we'd be happy to explore this with you.

Regarding the call this week, we have availability on Wednesday April 30 between 14:00–16:00 UTC and Thursday May 1 between 10:00–12:00 UTC. Either works on our end — just let us know which suits you best.

On the contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm afraid I can't share those externally. Internal contact details aren't distributed outside the company. The best path is to continue through me for now, and I can make sure the right people join the conversation at the appropriate stage.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
